packageSummary:
**Summary:** The 'East European Dhamaka (Summer 2024)' package is an 8-day tour covering Vienna, Prague, and Budapest. The itinerary includes visits to Cesky Krumlov Castle, Old Town Square, Astronomical Clock, Prague Castle, and Fisherman's Bastion, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Danube cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Vienna
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Vienna: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Prague
- Drive to Cesky Krumlov and enjoy a guided tour: See the Cesky Krumlov Castle.
- Drive to Prague and visit the Old Town square, Astronomical Clock, and Charles Bridge.

**Day 3:** Prague
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Prague: Visit a panoramic point on the Prague castle gallery.
- Learn the art of making beer at a microbrewery.

**Day 4:** Budapest
- Drive to Budapest and visit Bratislava for a mini train ride.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Budapest: See the equestrian statue of St. Stephen and Fisherman’s Bastion.

**Day 5:** Budapest
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Budapest: Visit the Heroes Square and enjoy some free time for shopping.
- Experience the Danube river cruise.

**Day 6:** Vienna
- Proceed to the Herend Porcelain factory & Museum.
- Visit the town of Tihany located on the shores of Lake Balaton.

**Day 7:** Vienna
- Visit McArthur Glen Designer Outlet.
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Vienna: Pass the magnificent Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 8:** Vienna
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Scandinavian Dhamaka (Summer 2024)' package is an 8-day tour covering Copenhagen, Oslo, Geilo, Stockholm, and Gothenburg. The itinerary includes visits to the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue, and many other interesting sights. Participants will enjoy guided city tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Copenhagen
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Copenhagen: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Oslo
- Board Cruise to Oslo
- Guided city tour of Oslo: See the Parliament Square, National Galleries, Karl Johan shopping street, the Royal Palace and Akhershus Fortress.

**Day 3:** Geilo
- Visit Vigeland Sculpture Park – Geilo
- Guided Tour of Oslo: See the Parliament Square, National Galleries, Karl Johan shopping street, the Royal Palace and Akhershus Fortress.

**Day 4:** Oslo
- Travel on one of Norway’s most popular trips ‘Norway in a nutshell’
- Visit the town of Karlstad – Photo stop at Lake Vanern

**Day 5:** Stockholm
- Guided city tour of Stockholm: See the Opera House, Alfred Nobel's House and the Royal Palace, Town Hall.
- Visit the Vasa Ship Museum.

**Day 6:** Gothenburg
- Guided city tour of Gothenburg
- Photo-stop of Oresund Bridge

**Day 7:** Copenhagen
- Guided city tour of Gothenburg
- Drive to Copenhagen. En-route we bypass the city of Malmo, Sweden's third largest city, stopping for a photo-op of the Turning torso and Oresund bridge.

**Day 8:** Copenhagen
- Fly back home with pleasant memories!
- Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Sri Lanka Ramayan Anant Yatra - Senior Citizens Veg Guided Darshan Tour' package is a 7-day tour covering Dambulla, Kandy, Nuwara Eliya, and Colombo. The itinerary includes visits to Munishwaram Temple, Manavari Temple, Trincomalee, Koneshwaram Temple, Shankari Devi Temple, Kanniya Hot Springs, Seetha Kotuwa, Gurulupotha Village, Kandy City, Temple of the Sacred Tooth, Nuwara Eliya City, Ella, Ravana Cave, Ravana Waterfall, Kataragama, Ussangoda, Rumasala, Galle Fort, Kelaniya Temple, Panchamuga Anjaneyar Temple, and Colombo City. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and visits to various temples and historical sites.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at Colombo Airport – Transfer to Dambulla via Chillaw [230 kms / 6 hrs]
- Meet & Greet, transfer to Dambulla and en route visit to Chilaw Munishwaram Temple & Manavari Temple.
- Check into the hotel and relax.

**Day 2:** Dambulla - Trincomalee – Dambulla [110km/2.5 hrs one way]
- Morning after breakfast at your hotel, proceed for full Day Excursion to Trincomalee visiting Temples of Koneshwaram, Shankari Devi, Kanniya Hot Springs.
- Return to the hotel and relax.

**Day 3:** Dambulla – Kandy [150 km/ 4 hrs]
- Morning after breakfast at your hotel, proceed for Kandy. En route we visit Seetha Kotuwa and Gurulupotha Village; and later doing sightseeing of Kandy City including tte Cultural Show and Temple of tooth Relic.
- Check in to the hotel and relax.

**Day 4:** Kandy - Nuwara Eliya:
- Morning after breakfast at your hotel, Proceed for exploring the City of Kandy
- Sightseeing in *Kandy, including Upper Lake Drive, Market Crafts Centre, and Gem Museum.
- Check into the hotel and relax.

**Day 5:** Nuwara Eliya- Ella – Kataragama [150km/4 hrs
- Morning after breakfast at your hotel, transfer to Kataragama (Kathirgamam) visiting Gayathri Peedam, Sita Amman Temple, Hakagala Botanical Garden (Ashoka Vatika) - Divrumpola Temple - Ravana waterfalls - Murugan Temple.
- Check into the hotel and relax.

**Day 6:** Kataragama – Colombo [270 Kms/ 6 hrs]
- Morning after breakfast, transfer to Colombo with en route visit to Ussangoda, Rumasala Sanjeevni Mountain, Galle Fort City, Kelaniya Temple, Panchamuga Anjaneyar Temple towards.
- Check into the hotel and relax.

**Day 7:** Shopping and Drop by 1300 Hrs at the Colombo International Airport For Departure
- Morning after Breakfast at the hotel, we drive past the Colombo City Attractions and do Shopping for 1Hr. Pls. Book Flight Post 1600 Hrs.
- Proceed to the Airport for your departure flight back home with all the memories you had on this beautiful island.

**Summary:** The 'American Grandeur (Summer 2024)' package is a 13-day tour covering San Francisco, Mammoth Lakes, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Niagara Falls, Harrisburg, Washington D.C., and New York City. The itinerary includes visits to the Golden Gate Bridge, Lake Tahoe, Universal Studios, the Statue of Liberty, and the Grand Canyon, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, helicopter rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to San Francisco
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of San Francisco: See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks.

**Day 2:** San Francisco
- Enjoy Bay Cruise - Visit Sausalito.
- Guided tour of San Francisco: See the Golden Gate Bridge and visit the town of Sausalito.

**Day 3:** Mammoth Lakes
- Drive to Lake Tahoe - Orientation Tour and drive to Mammoth Lakes.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Mammoth Lakes: See the scenic lake and visit the Mono Lake.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles
- Orientation tour of Lake Mammoth – Enjoy Gondola ride to Mammoth Mountain – Drive to Los Angeles – Visit Santa Monica Beach.
- Guided tour of Los Angeles: See the Third Street Promenade and visit Universal Studios.

**Day 5:** Los Angeles
- Visit Universal Studios - Orientation tour of LA.
- Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and many more.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas- the gambling capital of the world. Sphere Show Experience.
- Enjoy an action-packed day full of the best experiences on the US side of Niagara Falls.

**Day 7:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas. On arrival, check-in to your hotel. Later, explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.
- Tonight, we take you to Experience something revolutionary with ‘The Sphere Experience’ in Las Vegas!

**Day 8:** Niagara Falls
- Fly to Buffalo - Niagara Falls By Night.
- Visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 9:** Harrisburg
- Helicopter Ride. Niagara Falls - Ride the Maid of the Mist.
- Enjoy an action-packed day full of the best experiences on the US side of Niagara Falls.

**Day 10:** Washington D.C.
- Visit Hershey’s Chocolate World – “Experience make your own chocolate tour”. - Guided City Tour of Washington D.C. - Visit Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History.
- See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.

**Day 11:** Manhattan
- Drive to New York City - Visit to Swami Narayan Temple with Lunch. Guided tour of New York City.
- See the Central Park, Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, and many more sights.

**Day 12:** Manhattan
- Buggy Ride. Visit the Statue of Liberty. Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory. Visit Times Square.
- Experience New York’s iconic landmark the Times Square.

**Day 13:** Manhattan
- Bid farewell.
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.

**Summary:** The 'South African Dhamaka' package is a 7-day tour that takes you through the beautiful landscapes and vibrant cities of South Africa. The itinerary includes visits to Cape Town, Mossel Bay, and Johannesburg, with exciting activities such as a Seal Island Boat Cruise, Chapmans Peak, Cape Point entrance with Funicular tickets, Boulders Beach, and a Wine tasting with local lunch. You will also have the opportunity to visit the Cango Caves, Ostrich Farm, and the Cango Wildlife Ranch. The package includes return economy class group airfare and internal flights, accommodations at the hotels specified, all local taxes, cost of Visa and Medical Insurance, sightseeing, accommodation, and services as per the itinerary. The tour is led by a professional and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative.

**Summary:** The 'Char Dham Yatra By Helicopter Ex Dehradun' package is a 6-day tour covering Dehradun, Yamunotri, Gangotri, Guptakashi, and Badrinath. The itinerary includes visits to Yamunotri Dham, Gangotri Dham, Kedarnath Dham, and Badrinath Dham, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy helicopter rides, guided tours, and visits to temples, as well as accommodations in hotels listed or similar. The package includes meals as mentioned in the itinerary, government royalty fee, VIP darshan at all four temples, palki (sedan chair) at Yamunotri, and all local transport as per Toyota Innova or best available vehicle.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Dehra Dun
- Arrive Dehradun: Upon arrival at Dehradun airport, transfer to hotel.
- Meals: Dinner

**Day 2:** Yamunotri
- Dehradun to Yamunotri: Depart for Kharsali via helicopter on arrival at the helipad by 7:30 AM. Head to Yamunotri Dham by Palki (a structure generally used to carry people to the top of the mountains). Return to Karsali and rest of the day at leisure.
- Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner

**Day 3:** Gangotri
- Yamunotri to Gangotri: Early in the morning, depart for Harsil via helicopter by 7:45 AM. Your journey to Gangotri Dham (22 km approx.) will start at 8:15 AM. By 12:30 PM, return to the hotel and spend some time at leisure. At 4:30 in the evening and rest of the day at leisure.
- Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner

**Day 4:** Guptakashi
- Gangotri - Sarsi - Kedarnath - Sersi: Morning, head to Kedarnath by helicopter. Arrive at Sersi/ Kedarnath Helipad by 9:30 AM and proceed for Shri Kedarnath Ji Dham Darshan. By 12:00, return to Sersi Helipad and transfer to the hotel. Rest of the day at leisure.
- Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner

**Day 5:** Badrinath
- Sersi/ Kedarnath - Badrinath: Check out from the hotel and transfer to the helipad by car. You will depart for Badrinath via helicopter. On arrival in Badrinath at get ready for Temple Darshan and check in at the hotel. If time permit Head to Mana village. Rest of the day at leisure.
- Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner

**Day 6:** Dehra Dun
- Morning Pooja - Dehradun: After the breakfast and fly to Dehradun and drop at Airport
- Meals: Breakfast

**Summary:** The 'Magical Ladakh with Delhi' package is an 8-day tour covering Delhi, Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake. The itinerary includes visits to the Hall of Fame, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, and Sangam, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ATV rides, and visits to local markets and villages. The tour also includes a visit to the beautiful Pangong Lake and the scenic Nubra Valley.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Delhi
- Arrive at New Delhi airport and transfer to hotel.
- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 2:** Delhi to Leh
- Early morning transfer to airport for flight to Leh.
- Upon arrival, check-in to hotel and enjoy simple and light lunch.
- Rest of the day is free to acclimatize to the high altitude of Leh.
- Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 3:** Sham Valley Tour
- Visit the Hall of Fame, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, and Sangam.
- Return to hotel and relax for the day.
- Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 4:** Leh to Nubra Valley
- Drive to Nubra Valley through Khardungla, the World's highest motorable road.
- Visit the Hunder sand dunes and get the sight of the Double Hump Bactrian camels.
- Enjoy an ATV ride (on complimentary basis, one time).
- Overnight stay at camp.

**Day 5:** Nubra Valley
- Visit the Turtuk village, a border village that was recaptured by the Indian Army in 1971.
- Enjoy a full day excursion to Turtuk.
- Overnight stay at camp.

**Day 6:** Nubra to Pangong Lake
- Drive to Pangong Lake at 14,500 ft.
- Take in the breathtaking views and setting of the blue lake.
- Check-in to camp and enjoy lunch.
- Spend time on your own at leisure.
- Overnight stay at camp.

**Day 7:** Pangong to Leh
- Drive back to Leh.
- Visit the Thiksey Monastery and Shey Palace.
- Check-in to hotel and relax.
- Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 8:** Departure from Leh
- Transfer to Leh airport to board the flight back home.

**Price:** 74500.0

**Inclusions:**

* Return Airfare in economy class from Ex Hubs
* New Delhi airport transfer
* Accommodation on twin sharing basis as per chosen program
* Assistance on arrival
* All Meals –Breakfast, Lunches (Veg), Evening Tea/Coffee with cookies/snacks, Dinner as per itinerary (Ex Delhi stay is with Dinner)
* Transfers & sightseeing by Non AC vehicle on sharing basis as per group size as per the itinerary (Tempo Trv/Innova/Xylo/Scorpio)
* Inner line permits.
* Entrance tickets to monuments as per itinerary.
* Professional Tour Manager
* Evening Bonfire at Nubra (Subject to group size – 15 Pax & above)
* ATV Ride once only
* Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while travelling to Nubra and Pangong only.
* Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs).

**Exclusions:**

* Additional / personal use of vehicle.
* Any personal expenses, room service and special orders, alcoholic and non alcoholic beverages, porterage, tips, phone calls, laundry etc.
* Any extra excursions or sightseeing apart from the above specified itinerary.
* Camera fees & any incidental and other expenses which are not specified in the inclusions.
* GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates.

**Summary:** The 'Delightful Ladakh' package is a 6-day tour covering Leh, Thiksey, Shey, and Pangong Lake. The itinerary includes visits to Thiksey Gompa, Shey Palace and Gompa, Donkey Sanctuary, Leh Palace, Shanti Stupa, Hall of Fame, Spituk Monastery, Magnetic Hill, Gurdwara Patthar Sahib, Confluence of Zanskar and Indus rivers, and Khardungla Pass. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and excursions to Nubra Valley and Pangong Lake.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival Leh
- Arrive at Leh airport and transfer to hotel.
- Rest of the day free to acclimatize to the high altitude of Ladakh.
- Evening walk to the local bazaar in Leh.

**Day 2:** Leh
- Morning visit Thiksey Gompa and Shey Palace and Gompa.
- Visit Donkey Sanctuary and Leh Palace.
- Evening visit Shanti Stupa for sunset view.

**Day 3:** Leh
- Morning visit Hall of Fame, Spituk Monastery, and Magnetic Hill.
- Visit Gurdwara Patthar Sahib and Confluence of Zanskar and Indus rivers.

**Day 4:** Leh
- Morning excursion to Pangong Lake on the Indo-China border.
- Evening back to hotel in Leh for dinner and overnight.

**Day 5:** Leh
- Morning excursion to Khardungla Pass (the highest motorable road in the world).
- Return to Leh in the evening.

**Day 6:** Departure
- Leave for Leh airport to board your flight to Delhi.

**Price:** 34699.0

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place.
- 05 breakfasts and 05 dinners.
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (1 to 6 pax) & Non Ac Tempo Trv (7 to 12 pax) (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers, sightseeing as per the itinerary.
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing.
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while travelling to Nubra/ Pangong Only.
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs).

**Miscellaneous charges are inclusive like:**

- Ladakh Royalty Fee.
- Inner-line permits.
- Portages at hotel and airport.
- All applicable luxury/ road taxes.

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates.
- Airfares train fare.
- Any monastery entrance fees.
- Any Joy ride or rafting.
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind.
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature.
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charges extra.
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses.

**Summary:** The 'Marvellous Ladakh' package is a 7-day tour covering Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake. The itinerary includes visits to Hall of Fame, Spituk Monastery, Kali Mata Temple, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Patthar Sahib, Confluence of Zanskar - Indus rivers, White Sand Dunes at Hunder, Diskit monastery, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy camel rides, guided tours, and visits to monasteries and local markets. The package includes accommodation in twin/double sharing basis, 06 breakfasts and 06 dinners, transportation, assistance at the airport, oxygen cylinder, and travel insurance. The price is 42099.0.

**Summary:** The 'North East Delight With Lachung' package is a 9-day tour covering Gangtok, Lachung, Pelling, and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to Tsomgo Lake, Baba Mandir, Yumthang Valley, Do Drul Chorten, Institute of Tibetology, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and tea estates.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Bagdogra and transfer to Gangtok
- Arrive at Bagdogra Airport and transfer to Gangtok.
- Check-in to the hotel and relax.
- Meet and greet with the Tour Manager and fellow travelers.

**Day 2:** Gangtok
- Visit Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Gangtok, including the Do Drul Chorten and Institute of Tibetology.

**Day 3:** Lachung
- Drive to Lachung (8800 ft) and enjoy the scenic views of the Himalayas.
- Visit the Singhik View Point and the Seven Sisters Waterfall.

**Day 4:** Lachung
- Visit the Yumthang Valley and enjoy the scenic views of the valley.
- Return to Gangtok and enjoy a relaxing evening.

**Day 5:** Pelling
- Drive to Pelling and visit the Sky Walk, Pemayangtse Monastery, and Rabdentse Ruins.
- Enjoy a relaxing evening in Pelling.

**Day 6:** Darjeeling
- Drive to Darjeeling and visit the Tiger Hill, Ghoom Monastery, and Batasia Loop War Memorial.
- Enjoy a relaxing evening in Darjeeling.

**Day 7:** Darjeeling
- Visit the Padmaja N. Zoological Garden, Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, and Tibetan Refugee Self-help Centre.
- Enjoy a relaxing evening in Darjeeling.

**Day 8:** Siliguri
- Drive to Siliguri and visit the Mirik Lake.
- Enjoy a relaxing evening in Siliguri.

**Day 9:** Departure from Siliguri
- Check-out from the hotel and transfer to Bagdogra Airport for departure.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation on twin sharing basis as per chosen program
- Accommodation in mentioned or similar hotels
- Daily Breakfast, Enroute Veg Lunch & Dinner (Except Breakfast on day 1 and Enroute Lunch & Dinner on day of departure)
- Evening Tea / Coffee with cookies at Sterling Gangtok Orange Village & Sterling Darjeeling
- Transfers and Sightseeing by AC MUV (Ertiga / Innova / Xylo/ Marazzo or Similar) or Tempo Traveller Vehicle on sharing basis as per group size
- All toll taxes, parking charges, driver allowances
- All currently applicable hotel taxes
- Professional Tour Manager (Subject to group size – 20 Pax & above)
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Exclusions:**

- Being a group tour package, the departures will be operated on meeting the minimum operating strength of 10 passengers. Otherwise, passengers will be given an option of shifting to another operating departure or continue on the same departure by paying the private vehicle supplement as applicable.
- Any Air, Train, Bus or Cruise fare from / to your originating city of stay, unless specified
- Any transport services to or from your originating place to Ex hub as per itinerary
- Entrance fees of all sightseeing places to be visited
- Additional / personal use of vehicle
- Any personal expenses, room service and special orders, alcoholic and non alcoholic beverages, porterage, tips, phone calls, laundry etc.
- Any extra excursions or sightseeing apart from the above specified itinerary
- Camera fees & any incidental and other expenses which are not specified in the inclusions
- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates

**Summary:** The 'Focus on Scandinavia - Cosmos' package is a 12-day tour covering Denmark, Norway, and Sweden. The itinerary includes visits to Copenhagen, Oslo, Bergen, Fagernes, Karlstad, and Stockholm, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and cruises on the Sognefjord and Naeroyfjord. The package includes buffet breakfasts daily, 4 dinners, and a cruise on the Sognefjord, as well as the services of expert Cosmos Tour Directors and Local Guides.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Copenhagen, Denmark
- Arrive in Copenhagen and check into your hotel.
- Spend the rest of the day exploring the Danish capital.

**Day 2:** Copenhagen
- Enjoy a day at leisure in Copenhagen.
- Take an optional tour of Zealand's castles.

**Day 3:** Copenhagen - Odense - Frederikshavn
- Drive to Odense, Hans Christian Andersen's hometown.
- Continue to Frederikshavn on the rural Jutland Peninsula.

**Day 4:** Frederikshavn - Hirtshals - Kristiansand, Norway - Oslo
- Take a ferry ride from Hirtshals to Kristiansand.
- Continue to Oslo, Norway's capital city.

**Day 5:** Oslo - Telemark Area
- Take a scenic drive through the Telemark region.
- Visit Gustav Vigeland's sculptures and the National Theater.

**Day 6:** Telemark Area - Vemork - Bergen
- Visit the Vemork Museum and the heavy water plant.
- Take a scenic drive along lakes, valleys, and rugged gorges.

**Day 7:** Bergen
- Explore the city on the included orientation.
- Take an optional excursion to discover the history and traditions of the city.

**Day 8:** Bergen - Sognefjord / Næroyfjord Cruise - Fagernes Area
- Take a cruise on the Sognefjord and the Naeroyfjord.
- Continue to the Fagernes area.

**Day 9:** Fagernes Area - Lillehammer - Karlstad, Sweden
- Visit Lillehammer, the mountain resort that hosted the 1994 Winter Olympics.
- Continue to Karlstad, located by Sweden's largest lake, Lake Vanern.

**Day 10:** Karlstad - Mariefred - Stockholm
- Visit Gripsholm Castle and the idyllic town of Mariefred.
- Continue to Stockholm, the Swedish capital.

**Day 11:** Stockholm
- Take a city sightseeing tour of Stockholm.
- Visit the City Hall and other highlights.

**Day 12:** Stockholm
- Spend the day exploring the city at leisure.
- Depart for the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - From Madrid To Paris' package is a 7-day tour covering Madrid, Barcelona, and Paris. The itinerary includes visits to the Gran Vía district, Egyptian Debod Temple, Plaza de España, and more in Madrid. Participants will enjoy guided tours, visits to the Poblet Monastery, Poble Espanyol, and the Eiffel Tower, among other attractions. The tour also includes a high-speed train ride from Barcelona to Paris.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Madrid
- Welcome to Madrid
- Transfer to the hotel
- Evening transport to the Gran Vía district
- Visit to the Egyptian Debod Temple, Plaza de España, and more

**Day 2:** Madrid
- Guided tour of Madrid: Visit the Paseo del Prado, Cibeles, Neptuno, the Gate of Alcalá, Plaza de Colón, and Plaza Mayor
- Visit to the Retiro Park and the Bullring (admission included)
- Evening transfer to the Magic Fountain of Montjuich

**Day 3:** Barcelona
- Drive to Barcelona and visit the Poblet Monastery (entrance included)
- Visit to the Montserrat district and the city of Barcelona
- Visit to the Poble Espanyol (meaning 'Spanish Village')

**Day 4:** Barcelona
- Guided tour of Barcelona: Visit the city's historic central area with its Gothic neighborhood dating back to the Middle Ages
- Visit to the area where the Olympic Games took place
- Visit to La Sagrada Familia Basilica, the masterpiece designed by the architect Gaudí

**Day 5:** Paris
- High-speed train ride from Barcelona to Paris
- Transfer to the hotel

**Day 6:** Paris
- Guided tour of Paris: Visit the Eiffel Tower and the River Seine
- Visit to the Versailles Palace (entrance not included)
- Funicular ride to the Montmartre district

**Day 7:** Paris
- Visit to the 2nd Floor Eiffel Tower (ticket included)
- Boat cruise along the River Seine in Paris
- End of our services.

**Summary:** The 'Cosmos - Western Wonders' package is a 12-day tour covering Los Angeles, Palm Springs, Scottsdale, Williams, Las Vegas, Selma, Yosemite National Park, and San Francisco. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Hollywood Walk of Fame, Grand Canyon National Park, Golden Gate Bridge, and Fisherman's Wharf, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and free time to explore the cities and natural wonders. The package includes hand-selected accommodations, guided sightseeing, and seamless transportation between destinations, as well as buffet breakfasts daily and two dinners.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Los Angeles
- Meet Tour Director outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Los Angeles: See the Hollywood Walk of Fame, TCL Chinese Theatre, and more.

**Day 2:** Los Angeles
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Los Angeles: Visit the Original Farmers Market and explore the city on your own.

**Day 3:** Palm Springs
- Drive to Palm Springs and enjoy a guided tour: See the desert oasis and explore the city.

**Day 4:** Scottsdale
- Drive to Scottsdale and visit Old Town: See the Western storefronts and explore the city.

**Day 5:** Grand Canyon National Park
- Drive to Grand Canyon National Park and enjoy a guided tour: See the spectacular lakes, giant granite domes, and towering pinnacles.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas and visit the Golden Gate Bridge: See the iconic landmark and explore the city.

**Day 7:** Las Vegas
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Las Vegas: Visit the famous casinos and shows.

**Day 8:** Selma
- Drive to Selma and visit the agricultural land: See the vast Mojave Desert and explore the city.

**Day 9:** Yosemite National Park
- Drive to Yosemite National Park and enjoy a guided tour: See the giant granite domes, towering pinnacles, and cascading waterfalls.

**Day 10:** San Francisco
- Drive to San Francisco and visit the Golden Gate Bridge: See the iconic landmark and explore the city.

**Day 11:** San Francisco
- Proceed for a guided city tour of San Francisco: Visit Fisherman's Wharf and explore the city on your own.

**Day 12:** San Francisco
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'The Best of Spain & Portugal - By Cosmos' package is a 13-day tour covering Madrid, Granada, Cordoba, Seville, Lisbon, Porto, and Salamanca. The itinerary includes visits to Toledo, Alhambra Complex, Mezquita, Fatima, Coimbra, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city excursions, and visits to historical sites, as well as free time to explore the cities and their surroundings. The package includes meals, accommodations, and transportation between destinations, with expert Cosmos Tour Directors and Local Guides to enhance the experience.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrive in Madrid, Spain
- Check into your hotel.
- Relax or start exploring Madrid, taking advantage of the CosmosGO app.
- Meet your Tour Director and travel companions.

**Day 2:** Madrid - Toledo - Granada
- Drive south to Toledo.
- Visit the walled Old Town with a Local Guide and marvel at the 12th-century Church of St. Tome.
- Cross the Guadalquivir River and head for the olive and orange groves that dot the rolling Andalusian hills.
- Overnight in history-steeped Granada at the foot of the Sierra Nevada.

**Day 3:** Granada
- Enjoy a guided tour of Granada: Visit the Alhambra Complex, built by Moorish kings.
- Learn about olives and enjoy a local olive oil tasting.

**Day 4:** Granada - Cordoba
- Visit the Mezquita, famous for its 850 pillars of porphyry, marble, and jasper.
- Continue to vibrant, festive Seville.

**Day 5:** Seville
- Get to know Seville on the included city tour.
- Visit the cathedral, the beautiful La Giralda minaret tower, and the Real Alcázar palace.

**Day 6:** Seville - Evora, Portugal - Lisbon
- Enjoy the scenery of the Sierra de Aracena before crossing into Portugal.
- Visit Evora, a delightfully attractive city.
- Continue to Lisbon.

**Day 7:** Lisbon
- Henry the Navigator made Lisbon the 15th-century “Mistress of the Seas.”
- Visit the Belem Tower, the Moorish Citadel, and other highlights on the guided sightseeing tour.

**Day 8:** Lisbon - Fatima - Coimbra - Porto
- Stop in Fatima to visit its world-famous Sanctuary.
- Continue to Coimbra, known for its university, one of the oldest in Europe.
- On to Porto on the northern bank of the Douro River.

**Day 9:** Porto
- Discover Porto’s highlights on the guided city tour.
- Visit a Port wine cellar along the banks of the Douro River.
- Enjoy an included dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 10:** Porto - Salamanca, Spain
- Enjoy the plentiful woodlands and mountains on your return to Spain.
- Reach the ancient and beautiful university town of Salamanca in the early evening.

**Day 11:** Salamanca - Avila - Segovia - Madrid
- Journey to fortified Avila with its many towers.
- Visit St. Theresa’s Convent before continuing to Segovia, a medieval town picturesquely set on a rocky hill.
- Spend some time in Segovia before crossing the boundary between new and old Castile to arrive in Madrid.

**Day 12:** Madrid
- Built 2180 feet above sea level, Madrid, capital of Spain, is the nearest thing to Heaven, according to Spaniards.
- Discover the main highlights of this aristocratic city on the included guided tour.

**Day 13:** Madrid
- Your vacation ends with breakfast this morning.

**Summary:** The 'Heart of the Canadian Rockies - Cosmos' package is a 10-day tour that takes you through the breathtaking Canadian Rockies, covering Calgary, Banff, Jasper, Kamloops, Victoria, and Vancouver. The itinerary includes visits to Banff National Park, Lake Louise, Columbia Icefield, Jasper National Park, and Butchart Gardens, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and ferry crossings, as well as free time to explore the cities and their surroundings.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Calgary
- Welcome to Calgary! Your Tour Director is on hand late this afternoon to answer any questions.
- Orientation tour of Calgary: See many of the city’s attractions, including Canada Olympic Park and the Saddledome.

**Day 2:** Banff
- Drive to Banff National Park: Enjoy a scenic drive through the foothills and into the park.
- Guided tour of Banff: See the unspoiled beauty of the park and its surroundings.

**Day 3:** Banff
- Free day in Banff: Enjoy the park's many activities, including hiking, boating, and fishing.
- Optional helicopter ride over the Canadian Rockies.

**Day 4:** Jasper
- Drive to Jasper National Park: Enjoy a scenic drive through the park and its surroundings.
- Guided tour of Jasper: See the park's many attractions, including the Athabasca River and the town of Jasper.

**Day 5:** Jasper
- Optional excursion to Maligne Lake and Spirit Island: Enjoy a narrated cruise of the lake.
- Free time in Jasper: Enjoy the park's many activities and attractions.

**Day 6:** Kamloops
- Drive to Kamloops: Enjoy a scenic drive through the Fraser River and the Monashee Mountains.
- Overnight in Kamloops.

**Day 7:** Victoria
- Drive to Victoria: Enjoy a scenic drive through the Coast Mountain Range and the Pacific coastline.
- Ferry crossing to Vancouver Island: Enjoy the stunning views of the Strait of Georgia and the Gulf Islands.
- Guided tour of Victoria: See the city's many attractions, including Butchart Gardens and the Inner Harbour.

**Day 8:** Victoria
- Free day in Victoria: Enjoy the city's many activities and attractions.
- Optional wildlife and whale watching trip.

**Day 9:** Vancouver
- Drive to Vancouver: Enjoy a scenic drive through the city and its surroundings.
- Guided tour of Vancouver: See the city's many attractions, including Stanley Park and Gastown.

**Day 10:** Vancouver
- Free day in Vancouver: Enjoy the city's many activities and attractions.
- Departure from Vancouver.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Contrasts of Japan end Tokyo' package is a 9-day tour covering Tokyo, Kawaguchi, Kyoto, Osaka, Okayama, and Hiroshima. The itinerary includes visits to Tokyo Tower, Meiji Temple, Sensoji Temple, Arakurayama Sengen Park, Toyota Museum, Tenryu-ji Temple, Arashiyama bamboo forest, Fushimi Inari, Imperial Palace, Kinkakuji Temple, Todai-ji Temple, Horyu-ji Temple, Korakuen Gardens, Itsukushima Temple, Peace Museum, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat trips, and visits to traditional villages and museums.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Tokyo
- Welcome to Japan! Transfer by coach (SHUTTLE BUS) to hotel.
- Guided tour of Tokyo: See the Zojoji Temple, Meiji Temple, Sensoji Temple, and more.

**Day 2:** Tokyo
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Tokyo: Visit the Tokyo Tower, Shibuya, and more.
- Visit the traditional commercial street of Nakamise in the district of Asakusa.

**Day 3:** Tokyo - Kawaguchi
- Travel to the beautiful area of Monte Fuji, through pretty countryside on our way.
- Visit the FUJI SENGEN SHRINE set in a magical site surrounded by tall trees, and the starting point of the traditional pilgrimage to the mountain.
- Enjoy a delightful boat trip on Kawaguchiko Lake.

**Day 4:** Kawaguchi - Kyoto
- Continue along the pretty road bordered by lakes to IYASHI NO SATO NENBA, a tiny village destroyed by a typhoon in 1966 and later restored as a traditional open-air mountain village and museum.
- Visit the SHIRAITO FALLS, considered one of the most attractive sites in Japan.

**Day 5:** Kyoto
- Spend all day in the city that was the capital of Japan from the year 794 to 1868 and home to the Imperial Court.
- Visit the Tenryuji temple, one of the “five major Zen temples of Kyoto” and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, followed by a walk through its mystic bamboo forest.

**Day 6:** Kyoto - Osaka
- Leave for NARA and visit Todaiji, a magnificent Buddhist temple built in 752, which has a giant Buddha.
- Visit the HORYUJI Buddhist temple, a World Heritage Site that includes a seminary, monasteries and temples.

**Day 7:** Osaka - Okayama
- Leave for HIMEJI, where we will include entry to its immense complex that shows us the architecture of Japanese castles.
- Visit Korakuen, one of the most beautiful gardens in Japan, with its lakes, waterfalls and traditional teahouses.

**Day 8:** Okayama - Hiroshima
- Leave for KURASHIKI, a city with a very well preserved historical centre.
- Visit the Peace Memorial, the Dome of the bomb and the impressive Museum of Peace.
- Take a ferry to the island “where men and gods live together”, with the sanctuary of ITSUKUSHIMA dedicated to the guardian of the seas.

**Day 9:** Hiroshima - Tokyo
- After breakfast, transfer to the station to take the BULLET TRAIN to TOKYO.
- Arrival in Tokyo at around 2:00 pm. END OF THE TRIP.

**Summary:** The 'Swiss Delights (Summer 2024)' package is an 8-day tour covering Zurich, Engelberg, Leysin, and Milan. The itinerary includes visits to Rhine Falls, Lindt – Home of Chocolate, Mt. Titlis, and Lake Lucerne, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cable car rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Zurich
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Zurich: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Zurich
- Drive to Schaffhausen in Switzerland to see the Rhine falls.
- Visit the Lindt – Home of Chocolate to witness how the famous Swiss Chocolates are made.
- Proceed for an orientation tour of Zurich: See Lake Zurich, Graumunster and Fraumuster.

**Day 3:** Engelberg
- Drive to Cesky Krumlov and enjoy a guided tour: See the Cesky Krumlov Castle.
- Proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives and chocolates.
- Enjoy a cruise on Lake Lucerne.

**Day 4:** Engelberg
- Proceed for a visit to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.
- Visit Interlaken.

**Day 5:** Leysin
- Proceed to Bern - the capital city of Switzerland.
- Enjoy an orientation tour: see the Bear Pit, Gothic fountains, Zytglogge (Clock Tower) and the Swiss Parliament building.
- Enjoy the Bollywood Trails tour, covering some of the favourite Indian film locations in the Gstaad valley.
- Board the scenic Golden Pass train and enjoy panoramic views as we journey through alpine forest and picturesque villages.

**Day 6:** Leysin
- Proceed on an excursion to Glacier 3000.
- Enjoy breath-taking views of the iconic mountains such as Mont-Blanc, the Matterhorn, Eiger, Monch and Jungfrau from the Tissot Peak Walk.
- Visit the Charlie Chaplin Museum in Vevey and explore some aspects of the life and legacy of Charlie Chaplin – one of the world’s most renowned comic actors.

**Day 7:** Leysin
- Visit Zermatt and explore this mountain village at the foot of the Matterhorn on a walking tour.
- You may explore Zermatt on your own OR join us for an excursion to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise - you are whisked up by the Matterhorn Express cable railway and further up by a lift built into the rock - to the highest sightseeing platform in Europe.

**Day 8:** Milan
- Proceed to Milan airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Iceland Adventure - By Globus' package is an 8-day tour covering Reykjavik, Borgarnes, Akureyri, Egilsstadir, Hofn, and Vik. The itinerary includes visits to the geothermal heat and electric power station, hot springs, Gullfoss waterfalls, Thingvellir National Park, whale-watching cruise, Godafoss waterfall, Lake Myvatn, and the Vatnajokull Glacier, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to microbreweries and local specialties. The package includes meals, transportation, and accommodations at selected hotels.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Reykjavik
- Arrive in Reykjavik, Iceland
- Meet Tour Director and traveling companions for a welcome dinner at your hotel.

**Day 2:** Reykjavik - Hellisheidarvirkjun - Geysir - Gullfoss - Thingvellir - Borgarnes
- Visit the geothermal heat and electric power station
- Stop at the hot springs and taste local specialties with a glass of Geysir Schnapps
- Take pictures at the Gullfoss waterfalls
- Walk through the rift valley en route to Borgarnes

**Day 3:** Borgarnes - Hauganes - Akureyri
- Take a whale-watching cruise before continuing to Akureyri
- Take an orientation walk that includes the botanical gardens

**Day 4:** Akureyri - Godafoss - Lake Myvatn - Dettifoss - Egilsstadir
- Take pictures of the “Waterfall of the Gods”
- Stop at lake Myvatn
- Take photos of the most powerful waterfall in Europe (road conditions permitting) before continuing to Egilsstadir

**Day 5:** Egilsstadir - Hofn Area
- Scenic drive en route to Hofn
- Hear about the Lagarfljotwurm, a snake-like animal that is supposed to guard a pot of gold located by Lake Logurinn

**Day 6:** Hofn Area - Lake Jokulsarlon - Skaftafell National Park - Vik Area
- Take photos of the Vatnajokull Glacier (weather permitting)
- Scenic drive through Skaftafell National Park en route to Vik

**Day 7:** Vik Area - Seljalandsfoss - Reykjavik
- Scenic drive with views of the Eyjafjallajokull volcano
- Take photos of the waterfall
- Enjoy a farewell dinner at a local restaurant

**Day 8:** Reykjavik
- Safe travels until we meet again! Your vacation ends with breakfast this morning.

**Summary:** The 'Best of Canadian Rockies (Summer 2024)' package is a 9-day tour covering Calgary, Banff, Jasper, Kamloops, Whistler, and Vancouver. The itinerary includes visits to Sulphur Mountain, Lake Louise, Icefields Parkway, Maligne Canyon, and Capilano Suspension Bridge, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Calgary
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Calgary: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Banff
- Drive to Banff National Park - Canada’s oldest national park, nestled amid the Canadian Rocky Mountains.
- Visit Sulphur Mountain by Gondola Ride.

**Day 3:** Banff
- Explore Banff National Park: Visit Lake Louise, world famous for its turquoise water, the Victoria Glacier and soaring mountain backdrop.
- Marvel at Moraine Lake's opalescent waters; learn about the human history of the landscapes; look for moose, bear, and elk.

**Day 4:** Jasper
- Drive to Icefields Parkway, one of the world’s most scenic mountain drives, through the natural splendor of Banff and Jasper national parks.
- Visit Ice Explorer to a place where you can walk on, feel and drink from the Athabasca Glacier.

**Day 5:** Kamloops
- Drive to Jasper National Park: Visit Maligne Canyon, created by over 10,000 years of water erosion.
- Drive to Kamloops.

**Day 6:** Whistler
- Drive to Whistler, one of the largest ski resorts in North America and 2010 Vancouver winter Olympics venue.
- Take a ride on the breathtaking ‘Peak 2 Peak’ Gondola, a 4.4-kilometre world record-breaking journey provides an unparalleled perspective of British Columbia's rooftop and incomparable views of towering volcanic peaks, coastal rainforests, and ancient glaciers.

**Day 7:** Vancouver
- Drive to Vancouver, en route stop by to view the Shannon falls.
- Visit the Capilano Park and take a walk over the famous suspension bridge.
- Proceed on a guided city tour of Vancouver, visit Stanley Park, Canada Place and view the famous steam clock while driving through historic Gastown.

**Day 8:** Victoria
- Board the British Columbia Ferry and sail through the Active Pass and Gulfs Islands to Victoria.
- Visit the beautiful Butchart Gardens, the 55 acres of beautiful garden haven, overflowing with lush greens and colourful blooms.
- Proceed on a panoramic tour of Victoria, see the Royal British Columbia Museum, Victoria’s Inner Harbor and the Parliament Building.

**Day 9:** Vancouver
- Bid farewell.
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.

**Summary:** The 'Treasures Of North East' package is a 9-day tour covering Gangtok, Pelling, Kalimpong, and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, Tshangu Lake, Baba Mandir, Dello hills, Dr. Graham’s Home, Flower Nurseries, Jang-Dong-Palriffo Brang, and Durbin Dara Hills, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, excursions, and visits to local markets and tea estates.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport – Gangtok (130 Kms / 04 Hrs)
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Gangtok: Visit Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, and Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom.

**Day 2:** Gangtok
- After breakfast, go for a full day sightseeing covering Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, and Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom.
- Overnight at Hotel.

**Day 3:** Gangtok – Tshangu Lake (43 km / 03 hours)
- After breakfast, in the morning, start for excursion to Baba Mandir & Tshangu Lake.
- Back to Gangtok and Overnight at Hotel.

**Day 4:** Gangtok – Pelling (116 Km / 04 hours)

**Day 6:** Pelling – Kalimpong (115 Kms / 04 hrs approx.)

**Summary:** The 'Classic China' package is a 7-day tour covering Beijing and Shanghai. The itinerary includes visits to the Great Wall of China, Jade Factory, Tiananmen Square, Summer Palace, Forbidden City, People's Square, Silk Factory, Shanghai Museum, the 88th Floor of the Jinmao Tower, and Bund area, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city tours, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Beijing
- Arrive at Beijing
- Welcome to China’s capital city – Beijing, known as much for modern architecture as its ancient sites such as the grand Forbidden City complex, the imperial palace during the Ming and Qing dynasties.
- Upon arrival at Beijing, pick up from airport and transfer to your hotel. Check in at hotel (standard time approx 1400 hrs).
- Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Beijing
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Visit Great Wall at Juyong Pass, Jade Factory and Photo Stop at Olympic Stadium.
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Today we visit the Great Wall of China at Juyong Pass. The Great Wall of China is a series of fortifications that were built across the historical northern borders of ancient Chinese states and Imperial China as protection against various nomadic groups from the Eurasian Steppe.
- Later we visit the Jade factory and have a photo stop at the Olympic stadium.

**Day 3:** Beijing
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Visit Tiananmen Square, Summer Palace and Forbidden City.
- Today we visit the Tiananmen Square, which is a city square in the city center of Beijing, China, named after the eponymous Tiananmen ("Gate of Heavenly Peace") located to its north, which separates it from the Forbidden City.
- Later we visit the Forbidden City which was the political and ritual center of China for over 500 years. We then proceed to Summer Palace which is a vast ensemble of lakes, gardens and palaces in Beijing.

**Day 4:** Shanghai
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Beijing – Shanghai (flight/train not included).
- Today we check out and proceed to Shanghai, one of the world's major centers for finance, business and economics, research, science and technology, manufacturing, transportation and tourism.
- Upon arrival at Shanghai, pick up from airport/train station and transfer to your hotel. Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs).

**Day 5:** Shanghai
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Shanghai City Tour.
- Today we have the city tour of Shanghai where we visit multiple attractions such as People's square, Silk factory, Shanghai Museum, the 88th Floor of the Jinmao Tower and Bund area.

**Day 6:** Shanghai
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Visit Jade Buddha Temple & Taobao Market.
- Today we visit the Jade Buddha Temple which is famous for its Buddha statues made from jade. These statues are believed to have been brought to the temple from Burma by a Buddhist monk.
- Later, we visit the Taobao Market and Nanjing Road which is known as one of the busiest shopping streets in the world.

**Day 7:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home.

- After lunch we will return to the hotel. Evening free for the leisure activities. Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 3:** Nainital to Corbett (90kms/Approx 03Hrs)

**Day 5:** Mussoorie (Local City Tour)
- Morning after breakfast we will take you for a full day sightseeing tour of Mussoorie, tour includes Lal Tibba – The highest point in Mussoorie, located in Landour area, the oldest inhabited place in Mussoorie.
- Gun Hill – The second highest point in Mussoorie, offers a panoramic view of the Himalayas.
- Municipal Gardens – Also known as Botanical Gardens of Mussoorie has an artificially created lake, which is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- Kempty Falls – 15 kms from Mussoorie on the Yamunotri Road is the most fascinating and the biggest waterfall.
- Camel’s Back Road – The place offers a picturesque view of the sunset and a life like resemblance of a sitting camel.
- Mussoorie Lake – An artificially created lake is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- After sightseeing return to the hotel. Dinner & Overnight stay at Mussoorie hotel.

**Summary:** The 'Char Dham Yatra Ex Delhi' package is a 12-day tour covering Haridwar, Barkot, Uttarkashi, Guptkashi, Sitapur, Kedarnath, Badrinath, and Rudraprayag. The itinerary includes visits to Har Ki Pauri, Barkot, Uttarkashi, Gangotri, Kedarnath, Badrinath, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, treks, and visits to temples and holy sites.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Delhi - Haridwar (225 Km: 5 Hrs)
- Arrive New Delhi and drive to Haridwar. On arrival at Haridwar, check in to your hotel. In the evening, proceed to Har Ki Pauri to enjoy Ganga Aarti on the banks of Ganges. Dinner and Overnight stay at Haridwar.

**Day 2:** Haridwar - Barkot (205 Km: 8 Hrs)
- This morning depart for Barkot, located on the foot of Yamunotri. On arrival at Barkot, check-in to your hotel/camp. Rest of the day is free to relax and store your energy for the Pahad (hiII) Yatra of Yamunotri the next day. Dinner and Overnight stay at Barkot.

**Day 3:** Barkot - Yamunotri (45 Km: 2 Hrs + 5 Km Start Trek/5 Km Start Trek) - Barkot/Kharsali (5 Km Start Trek + 45 Km: 2 Hrs)
- After breakfast/packed breakfast, depart at 5/6am for Hanumanchatti (40 Km), Janki Chatti (5 km). Here you will begin the First Pahad Yatra of Yamunotri (5 Km trek). You can hire a Doli or a horse, for your trek (Cost Not Included). The trek passes through lush green valley, a profusion of conifers, rhododendrons, cacti and several species of Himalayan shrubs.

**Day 4:** Barkot - Uttarkashi (85 Km: 3 Hrs)
- After breakfast check out from the Barkot hotel and drive to Uttarkashi. On arrival check in into the hotel. Uttarkashi is situated on the banks of river Bhagirathi and is famous for its historical monuments, Temples & Ashrams. Dinner and Overnight stay at Uttarkashi.

**Day 5:** Uttarkashi - Ganganani - Gangotri (97KMS /4 HRS) - Uttarkashi (97KMS / 3 To 4 HRS)
- Early After breakfast/packed breakfast and drive to Gangotri. Nestled in the magnificent Garhwal Himalayas, Gangotri is set at an altitude of 3048 mts. Upon arrival at Gangotri take a holy dip in the sacred river Ganges which is also called Bhagirathi at its origin Visit the Gangotri Temple. The 18th century's temple dedicated to Goddess Ganga is located near a sacred stone where King Bhagirathi worshipped Lord Shiva. Ganga is believed to have touched earth at this spot. The temple is an exquisite 20 ft. high structure made of white granite. After performing Pooja Late afternoon drive back to Uttarkashi. Dinner & Overnight stay at Uttarkashi.

**Day 6:** Uttarkashi - Sitapur (203 Kms/ 9Hr)
- After early morning breakfast check out from the hotel and drive for Sitapur. Dinner and Overnight stay in Guptkashi hotel/Camps.

**Day 7:** Sitapur - Sonprayag - Kedarnath (30 Km + 20 Km Trek)
- Early morning after breakfast check out from the hotel and drive to Sonprayag. From where, you will start your 20 km trek to Kedarnath. You can hire a Doli or a horse, for your trek (Cost Not Included). Mandakini, one of the main tributaries of the Ganges originates at Kedarnath and flows through Gaurikund. Trudging with you are pilgrims chanting "Jai Bholenath." Sometimes the mist would envelop the mountains and slowly lift away, revealing a shiny blinding-white peak that threatens to rupture the skies.

**Day 8:** Kedarnath - Sonprayag - Guptkashi (20 Km Trek + 30 Km Drive)
- Early morning you get up before dawn and after taking bath you are at the temple by 4:45 am for the 'Abhishek’ to Kedarnath Shiva. Everyone can go inside Garbha Griha and touch the idol. You can also prostrate with your head touching the deity etc. After darshan and puja you come out of the temple and return to the Govt. Camps / Lodges. Later you'll start the return trek of 20 km from Kedarnath to Sonprayag. The vehicles wait for you in Sonprayag Car Parking and you’ll drive to your hotel/Camps. Dinner and Overnight stay at Guptkashi.

**Day 9:** Guptkashi - Joshimath - Badrinath (200 Km: 7 To 8 Hrs)
- This morning, you check out of the hotel and drive to Badrinath via Joshimath. After driving through some wonderful Ghat road you arrive at Badrinath (Must cross Govindghat before 5:30 pm). On arrival check into the hotel. After some rest and refreshments you are all set to go to Badrinath Temple for darshan in the evening. But first you have to go to Tapt Kund (Hot Spring), take bath and then go to the temple. Dedicated to Lord Vishnu, the temple of Shri Badrinath Ji is 15 meters in height, built in the form of a cone with a small cupola of a gilt bull and spire. Later back to hotel. Dinner and Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 10:** Badrinath - Joshimath - Birahi/Rudraprayag/Srinagar (92 Km: 3 Hrs/165 Km: 5 To 6 Hrs/195 Km: 6 To 7 Hrs)
- This morning, go for Badrinath darshan. After darshan return back to hotel, breakfast at hotel and proceed for Badrinath local sightseeing visit Mana Village and Bheem Pul. Afternoon driver back to Rudraprayag via Karanprayag. Rudraprayag is a small pilgrim town on the holy confluence of river Alaknanda and Mandakini. On arrival check in at hotel. Rest of the day free to explore the Rudraprayag town. Dinner and Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 11:** Birahi/Rudraprayag/Srinagar - Rishikesh - Haridwar (230 Km: 7 To 8 Hrs/165 Km: 5 To 6 Hrs/135 Km: 4 To 5 Hrs)
- Early morning, after breakfast, you drive downhill to Rishikesh a spiritual city and the Yoga capital of the world. On reaching Rishikesh you'll do the Rishikesh sightseeing visit Ram Jhula and Laxman Jhula. Evening drive to Haridwar. On arrival check in at hotel. Dinner and Overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 12:** Haridwar - Delhi (225 Km / 5 Hrs)
- Morning breakfast at hotel, and you are on your last lap of this Chardham Yatra journey. Drive back to Delhi. On reaching Delhi transfer to Railway Station/Airport.

The itinerary includes visits to Ellora Caves, Ajanta Caves, Pench National Park, Tadoba Tiger Reserve, and Nashik, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, game safaris, and vineyard tours, as well as luxurious accommodations and meals on board the train. The package offers a unique blend of culture, history, and wildlife, and is a great way to experience the natural beauty and rich heritage of Maharashtra.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Mumbai
- Arrive at Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus and board the luxury train.
- Proceed to the hotel for check-in and dinner.

**Day 2:** Aurangabad
- Visit Ellora Caves, a World Heritage site.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the caves and learn about their history and significance.

**Day 3:** Aurangabad
- Visit Bibi-Ka-Maqbara, a replica of the Taj Mahal at Agra.
- Explore the famous Himroo fabric weaving centre.

**Day 4:** Pench
- Arrive at Ramtek and drive to Pench National Park.
- Enjoy morning and afternoon game safaris in the park.

**Day 5:** Tadoba
- Reach Chandrapur and set out for the Tadoba Tiger Reserve.
- Enjoy lunch at the forest lodge and learn about tiger conservation.

**Day 6:** Jalgaon

**Day 7:** Nashik

- Visit a vineyard and enjoy wine tasting and lunch.

**Day 8:** Mumbai
- Arrive at Mumbai, where the journey comes to an end.

- Guided tours and game safaris in various national parks and wildlife sanctuaries.
- Visits to historical and cultural sites, including Ellora Caves and Ajanta Caves.
- Enjoy wine tasting and vineyard tour in Nashik.
- Experience the natural beauty and rich heritage of Maharashtra.

**Summary:** The 'Striking Bhutan' package is a 6-day tour covering Thimphu and Paro. - Visit Buddha viewpoint, Changangkha Lhakhang, the oldest temple in the valley, Enclosure where national animal, Takin are kept and Zilukha Nunnery

**Day 3:** Thimphu – Paro

**Summary:** The 'Elegant Bhutan' package is a 7-day tour that takes you through the beautiful landscapes and rich culture of Bhutan. The itinerary includes visits to Thimphu, Punakha, Phobjikha, and Paro, where you will experience the country's unique blend of tradition and modernity. You will visit iconic landmarks such as the Handmade Paper Mill, School of Arts and Crafts, Memorial Chorten, and the Tiger's Nest Temple, among others. The package includes accommodation on a twin-sharing basis, round-trip transportation, sightseeing, daily breakfast and dinner, and an exclusive English-speaking guide service. The price for this package is 48200.0, and it is available for Indian nationals only. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Paro & transfer to Thimphu (55 km/ 02 hour drive)
- Arrive in Paro and meet your representative and guide who will transfer you to your hotel in Thimphu.
- Visit the weekend market (Thu-Sun) where you can see vegetable vendors from different parts of the country selling their products.

**Day 2:** Thimphu Sightseeing
- Visit the Handmade Paper Mill, School of Arts and Crafts (closed on Sundays, government holidays), and the National Library.
- Visit the Memorial Chorten built in memory of the 3rd King, Buddha viewpoint, Changangkha Lhakhang, the oldest temple in the valley, Enclosure where national animal, Takin are kept, and Zilukha Nunnery.

**Day 3:** Thimphu to Punakha (75 km / 2 ½ Hrs)
- Drive to Punakha and visit the most beautiful Punakha Dzong, which houses the most elaborate temple in the country.
- Visit the Dochula pass at 3150m, which offers a spectacular view of the highest mountains of Bhutan.

**Day 4:** Punakha to Phobjikha (98 km/ 03 hour drive)
- Visit the Chimi Lhakhang on foot, the temple of fertility associated with religious art of phallus.
- Visit the Wangdi ruin Dzong and continue to Phobjikha over the pass at 3140m.

**Day 5:** Phobjikha to Paro (200 km/ 06 hour drive)
- Visit the National Museum, the first of its kind which has a collection from natural history to religious paintings.
- Visit the 17th-century Paro Dzong (Fortress) on foot and continue walking through the oldest wooden bridge still in use.

**Day 6:** Paro Sightseeing
- Hike to Tiger's Nest Temple, the most revered temple in the country that literally hangs on a granite cliff overlooking the Paro valley at 900m above the valley floor.
- Visit the Kichu Lhakhang, one from the two oldest temples built in the 7th century.

**Day 7:** Departure
- Take away the sweet memories of Bhutan and transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

**Summary:** The 'Exotic Bhutan' package is an 8-day tour covering Thimphu, Punakha, and Paro. The itinerary includes visits to Handmade paper mill, School of Arts and crafts, Memorial Chorten, Buddha viewpoint, Changangkha Lhakhang, Takin enclosure, Zilukha Nunnery, Dochula pass, Punakha Dzong, Chimi Lakhang, Phobjika Valley, Goempa Monastery, National Museum, Paro Dzong, Kichu Lhakhang, and Tiger's Nest Temple, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and cultural experiences.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Paro & transfer to Thimphu
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the weekend market (Thu-Sun) in Thimphu.

**Day 2:** Thimphu Sightseeing
- Visit Handmade paper mill, School of Arts and crafts (closed on Sundays, government holidays).
- Visit nearby folk heritage museum and National Library.
- Visit Buddha viewpoint, Changangkha Lhakhang, the oldest temple in the valley, Enclosure where national animal, Takin are kept and Zilukha Nunnery.

**Day 3:** Thimphu to Punakha
- Drive to Punakha (75Kms 3hrs).
- Visit the most beautiful Punakha Dzong, which houses the most elaborated temple in the country.
- Visit and Chimi Lakhang on your way to Punakha.

**Day 4:** Punakha-Phobjikha-Punakha
- Proceed for a day trip to the beautiful Phobjika Valley and Goempa Monastery.

**Day 5:** Punakha to Paro
- Drive to Paro (130Kms 4hrs).
- Visit National Museum, the first of its kind which has a collection from natural history to religious paintings.
- Visit 17 century Paro Dzong (Fortress) on foot and continue walking through the oldest wooden bridge still in use.
- Visit Kichu Lhakhang, one from the two oldest temples built in 7th century.

**Day 6:** Paro-Haa-Paro
- Proceed for a day excursion to Ha valley.
- Visit Chelela Pass, your highest point of the trip at 3988m from where we can view spectacular views of both Haa valley and Paro valley.
- If the weather permits one can view the most scared mountain in the country Mt. Jomolhari (7314m).

**Day 7:** Paro Sightseeing
- In the morning, we will hike to Tiger’s Nest Temple, the most revered temple in the country that literally hangs on a granite cliff overlooking the Paro valley at 900m above the valley floor.
- The temple is associated with Guru Rimpoche who visited in 8th century and believed to have meditated three months in this cave and converted entire valley into Buddhism.

**Day 8:** Departure
- Take away the sweet memories of Bhutan.
- Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

**Summary:** The 'Magical Kerala' package is a 6-day tour covering Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady, and Marari. The itinerary includes visits to Mattancherry Palace, Fort Kochi, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Chinese Fishing Net, and Kochi Marine Drive. Participants will also enjoy sightseeing tours of Munnar, Thekkady, and Marari, including visits to Eravikulam National Park, Spice Plantation, and Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary. The package includes accommodation in mentioned or similar hotels, daily breakfast, and all transfers and sightseeing by AC vehicle.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Kochi
- Welcome to Kochi, popularly known as “THE QUEEN OF ARABIAN SEA”. Upon arrival at the Kochi international airport / Ernakulam Railway Station start on your journey to the hotel in Kochi.
- Kochi is a major port city, situated on the west coast of Peninsular India. It is surrounded by the Arabian Sea on the west and Western Ghats on the east.
- Reach hotel & complete check-in formalities. Evening is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Kochi to Munnar (135Kms/5Hrs)
- Relish delicious breakfast at the hotel and post check-out formalities let us explore a few nearby tourist attractions of Kochi like, Mattancherry Palace popularly known as the Dutch Palace, Fort Kochi, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Chinese Fishing Net and Kochi Marine Drive.
- Later start your journey to the hill station of Munnar. Cosseted by lush greeneries, guarded by captivating hills and mountains, and fringed with never-ending tea plantations, Munnar is also known as the ‘Nature Lover’s Paradise’ and will surely hold you captive throughout your stay.
- On the way you can visit Cheeyappara Waterfalls and Valara waterfalls
- Arriving in this hilly retreat, you will be checked-in to a hotel or a resort.

**Day 3:** Munnar
- After a delightful breakfast, get ready to leave for a full day sightseeing tour of Munnar. Smell the aroma of tea plantations in Munnar and spot the elusive Nilgiri Tahr at Eravikulam National Park, or Visit Tea Museum enroute visit Tea Estates.
- Head to Rose Garden and Mattupetty Dam.
- Later visit Eco Point, The Blossom Hydel Park and Munnar Botanical Garden.
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay.

**Day 4:** Munnar to Thekkady (110Kms/3.5Hrs)
- Relish the lip-smacking breakfast at the hotel, check-out and we will drive you to a next highly picturesque destination Thekkady. Enroute visit Spice Plantation.
- On arrival, check-in at the hotel and relax for some time. Later walk on the street on Thekkady and visit Elephant Junction to enjoy Elephant Ride and watch Elephant Bathing in evening be mesmerized by a live show of Kalaripayattu (Kerala Martial arts) (On Direct Payment basis)
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay.

**Summary:** The 'Best of Thailand With Phuket and Krabi - Durga Puja Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Krabi, Phuket, and Bangkok. The itinerary includes visits to Aonang, Krabi 4 Islands Tour, Phuket City Tour, Dolphin Show, Phuket Fanta Sea Show, and Chaophraya Cruise, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and shopping areas.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Krabi, Meals: Dinner, Description: 
Arrive Krabi – Panoramic Tour Of Aonang
Welcome to Krabi – an island in Thailand that is known for its coral vistas, breath-taking landscape, and serenity. Upon arrival in Krabi, proceed for a panoramic city tour of Aonang and then transferred to the hotel. Check in the hotel and relax. Evening proceed for dinner at an Indian Restaurant.

**Day 2:** Krabi, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner, Description: 
Krabi – Krabi 4 Island Tour
Today after breakfast, proceed for an exciting day – today we visit the "Krabi 4 Islands Tour with local lunch" The 4 Islands Tour is a true Krabi classic. The speedboat will take you to some of Krabi's most iconic landmarks. Snorkel at your own expense in the crystal clear turquoise waters and don't forget to snap a photo with the background of its famous rock. If you are taking the tour at low tide, you will get to walk the narrow strap of sands connecting the tiny islands. Relax and take in stunning Krabi views.

**Day 3:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Arrive Phuket - City Tour Of Phuket - Dolphin Show
After breakfast, check out from the hotel and drive to Phuket by road. Welcome to Phuket - Famous for its exotic beaches, vibrant nightlife, colorful night markets, water sports, and beautiful scenery. Explore the best of Phuket city and visit some of the iconic places on your Thailand vacation. Get a chance to learn about the history and culture of Thailand with the help of an English-speaking guide. Spend some time to admire the natural beauty of Thailand's largest island. Look at prominent tourist destinations of Phuket like Big Buddha, Naka Market, etc. You will be able to witness the grand Sino-colonial mansions in the Old town of Phuket. Stop for souvenir shopping in Phuket and go back with cherishable memories. Post this stop to do the Dolphin Show – this amazing 45-minute Dolphin show – showcases the intelligence of the Dophin’s via performances, tricks, and plays.

**Day 4:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Phuket – Phuket Fanta Sea Show
After breakfast, today day at leisure and in the evening you will be taken to the famous “Phuket Fanta sea Show” Inspired by Thailand's rich and exotic heritage, Phuket Fanta sea not only showcases the charm and beauty of Thailand but also enriches ancient Thai traditions with the wonder of cutting-edge technology and special effects. The result is a stunning 140-acre themed complex packed with a multitude of activities and entertainments: a carnival village with games, handicrafts, and shopping; a 4,000-seat themed restaurant offering a grand buffet of Thai and international cuisines; a breath-taking Las Vegas-style theatrical show, displaying Thailand's myths, mysteries, grace, and beauty, not to mention the troupe of elephants, fire-eaters, graceful dancers, and even a tiger! This wondrous extravaganza is certain to delight the whole family.

**Day 5:** Bangkok, Meals: Breakfast and Gala Dinner, Description: 
Krabi – Bangkok – Bangkok City Tour
Enjoy breakfast and enjoy this morning you will transferred to the airport for your flight to Bangkok. Upon arrival in Bangkok, you will meet and transferred straight for a city tour of Bangkok. Visit the “Marble Buddha” & ‘Wat Traimit’ temple of the Golden Buddha. In the evening today, you will be transferred for a Gala Dinner. Overnight in Bangkok.

**Day 6:** Bangkok, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Bangkok - Chaophraya Cruise
Enjoy breakfast and explore the extremely famous shopping options in Bangkok. Shop till you drop. In the evening the last day of your trip, you can proceed for a Chaophraya dinner cruise. The cruise takes you through the amazing Experience where you will be dazzled in Thai Exquisite Architecture, absorbed with Thai Cultural and History from the past to present standing elegant just before the river. Let The Chaophraya Cruise be the one that is your last memory etched forever of your trip.

**Day 7:** Bangkok, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Bangkok Depart
Today after breakfast at your hotel, proceed to the airport as this fantastic tour comes to an end. Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Return home with wonderful memories of your tour with your tour guide.

- Check in at hotel at Bhimtal. Evening free at leisure OR you can enjoy the boating on Bhimtal Lake (Direct Payment basis), Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 2:** Nainital (Local Sightseeing)
- Today in the morning after breakfast we will take you for a sightseeing tour of Nainital.
- Including Sat Tal, Naukuchia Tal. Visit to Mall Road, one can do a boat ride at Naini Lake (Direct Payment Basis) & can have darshan at Naini Devi Temple.
- In the Afternoon, we will take you to the prescribed location for the lunch.
- After lunch we will return to the hotel. Evening free for the leisure activities. Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 3:** Nainital to Corbett (65kms/02Hrs)
- Check out from hotel after having a delectable breakfast.
- Travel to Corbett, on arrival check in to your pre booked hotel, After lunch you can enjoy the ambience of the hotel.
- Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 4:** Corbett (Local Tour)
- Wake Up calls for your morning jeep Safari to experience the Corbett wilderness, Rich in flora and fauna, it’s known for its Bengal tigers.
- Animals, including tigers, leopards and wild elephants roam the entire Corbett region.
- After the memorable safari experience, return to the hotel, fresh n up at wildlife resort, followed by hot mouth-watering breakfast.
- After breakfast we will take you to Garjiya Mata Temple located at beautiful surrounding of Corbett National park.
- In the evening we will visit Corbett Museum, a place where you can get information about Corbett Park, Famous Hunter cum conservator Jim Corbett as well as famous tigers of Corbett national park.
- Dinner followed by overnight stay at wildlife resort.

**Day 5:** Corbett – Mussoorie (255kms /Approx 07hrs)
- After breakfast we will check out from the hotel and get ready to Travel to Mussoorie, on the way we will have our lunch at the prescribed location.
- In the day time we will reach to the Queen of Hills – Mussoorie. On arrival check in to your pre booked hotel.
- Evening free for the leisure activities. Dinner & overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 6:** Mussoorie (Local City Tour)
- Morning after breakfast we will take you for a full day sightseeing tour of Mussoorie, tour includes Lal Tibba – The highest point in Mussoorie, located in Landour area, the oldest inhabited place in Mussoorie.
- Gun Hill – The second highest point in Mussoorie, offers a panoramic view of the Himalayas.
- Municipal Gardens – Also known as Botanical Gardens of Mussoorie has an artificially created lake, which is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- Kempty Falls – 15 kms from Mussoorie on the Yamunotri Road is the most fascinating and the biggest waterfall.
- Camel’s Back Road – The place offers a picturesque view of the sunset and a life like resemblance of a sitting camel.
- Mussoorie Lake – An artificially created lake is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- After sightseeing return to the hotel. Dinner & Overnight stay at Mussoorie hotel.

**Day 7:** Mussoorie – Delhi (300 Kms/ Approx 07Hrs)
- Today morning, it’s time to say Good bye and carry lots of memories for this beautiful tour.
- After breakfast check out and drive back to Delhi. On reaching we will transfer you to airport or railway station for your journey back home.

**Summary:** The 'West Bengal - Sunderban National Park 2N' package is a 3-day tour covering Sunderban National Park. The itinerary includes visits to the Sunderban Tiger Camp, Dobanke Watch Tower, and Pakhiralay Island, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and cultural shows, including the Bonbibi Yatra, a local rural theatre performance. The package includes accommodation in the Sunderban Tiger Camp, daily meals, and transfers.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Sunderban
- Drive from Kolkata Airport / Howrah Railway Station to Gothkhali Jetty (approx. 115 kms/03 hrs.).
- Cruise through rivers Gomor, Durgadhwani to enter river Pitchkhali on banks of where lies the Sunderban Tiger Camp.
- Visit the native village of Dayapur and learn about the lifestyle, local crafts, cuisines, and way of life of the local villagers.
- Evening watch Movie show on the Tigers. A warm dinner cooked with farm fresh vegetables and is served at the Fisherman’s Wharf dining hall.

**Day 2:** Sunderban
- Post breakfast proceed for a thrilling cruise towards Dobanke Watch Tower as we move into the Sunderban Tiger Reserve Forest through creeks and dense forest and numerous rivers.
- Visit the spotted deer rehabilitation centre after which you cruise back through Matla – Sea Face (the point from where Bay of Bengal can be seen) to Sunderban Tiger Camp for lunch.
- Visit Pakhiralay Island which is about half an hour away from your resort by boat.
- Evening cultural show – Bonbibi Yatra, performed by local villagers.

**Day 3:** Sunderban
- As you wake up to the chirping of birds and morning wake up bell, a hot cup of tea is served in your balcony.
- View the array of birds in the fruit trees near your cottage.
- Post breakfast head for the morning cruise into the Sunderban Tiger Reserve once again through creeks and rivers heading to the Sudhayakhali Watchtower.
- Cruise back to Sunderban Tiger Camp for an early lunch you will be transferred back to Gothkhali.
- On arrival at Gothkhali picked up by your vehicle and return back to Kolkata Airport / Railway Station for onward journey.

**Summary:** The 'Mesmerizing Uttarakhand - Senior Citizen Special' package is a 9-day tour covering Haridwar, Mussoorie, Rishikesh, Corbett, and Bhimtal. - Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit to Har-ki-Pauri to view the holy Ganges Aarti.

**Day 2:** Mussoorie
- Drive to Mussoorie (80 Kms / Approx 02:30 Hrs)
- Check in resort and relax.
- Have the authentic Garhwali Lunch at hotel and enjoy the ambience.

**Day 3:** Mussoorie

**Day 4:** Rishikesh

- Check in at the hotel in Rishikesh and after some rest & Lunch in the hotel, get ready for sightseeing.
- Visit Laxman Jhula, Lakshman (Laxman) Jhula, a very long of about 450 ft Iron Bridge suspended over the mighty Ganges River.

**Day 5:** Corbett

- Check in to your pre booked hotel.
- Your lunch is awaiting yourself, after having lunch just relax and enjoy your time.

**Day 7:** Bhimtal

**Day 8:** Nainital
- Morning after breakfast we will take you for a sightseeing tour of Nainital.
- Drive for lake tour of Sat Tal, Naukuchia Tal & Naini Lake.
- It is believed that Naini Lake is one of the 64 Shakti Peethas, or religious sites where parts of the charred body of Sati (Parvati) fell on earth while being carried by Lord Shiva.

**Day 9:** Departure from Delhi
- After breakfast drive back to Delhi.
- On reaching we will transfer you to airport or railway station for your journey back home.

**Summary:** The 'Ladakh Extravaganza with Kashmir' package is an 11-day tour covering Srinagar, Sonmarg, Kargil, Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake. The itinerary includes visits to Gulmarg, Sonmarg, Kargil, Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Shikara ride on Dal Lake, Gondola ride at Gulmarg, ATV ride at Nubra Sand dunes, and visits to monasteries and local markets.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Srinagar
- Arrive in Srinagar and transfer to House Boat located at Dal Lake.
- Enjoy Shikara ride on the Dal Lake in the evening.

**Day 2:** Srinagar
- Visit Gulmarg, the most beautiful hill station in Kashmir.
- Enjoy a Gondola ride (cable car) from Gulmarg to Khalinmarg.

**Day 3:** Sonmarg
- Drive to Sonmarg - the Meadow of Gold.
- Visit the Sindhu Valley, the largest tributary of the valley of Kashmir.

**Day 4:** Kargil
- Drive to Kargil, the road passes through the panoramic village of Sonmarg.
- Visit the Drass, the second coldest inhibited place in the world.

**Day 5:** Leh
- Drive to Leh, visiting the monastery of Mulbekh & Lamayuru & Moon landscape.
- Visit the confluence of the Indus & Zanskar river (Sangam).

**Day 6:** Leh
- Visit Thiksey Monastery, located on a hill-lock with formidable views of the Indus valley.
- Visit Shey Palace, the former summer palace of the King of Ladakh.

**Day 7:** Nubra Valley
- Drive to Nubra Valley, driving over the highest motored pass in the world.
- Visit the Deskit Gompa, perched on a rocky spur above the village.

**Day 8:** Nubra Valley
- Visit Turtuk, a border village that was recaptured by the Indian Army in 1971.
- Enjoy an ATV ride at Nubra Sand dunes.

**Day 9:** Pangong Lake
- Drive to Pangong Lake, situated at 14, 500 ft above sea level.
- Enjoy a day at Pangong Lake.

**Day 10:** Leh
- Drive back to Leh via Changla Pass 5486 Mtrs.
- Visit the Leh Palace, a former royal palace overlooking the town of Leh.

**Day 11:** Departure from Leh
- Transfer to Leh airport to board the flight back home.
